title: Cross-stack Long-cycle Validation
outOfScope: Real cloud/provider deployment or identity verification

sources.reason: Existing independent adopter Git lifecycle harness.

riskAssessment.reason: The work aggregates bounded local fixture and Git evidence without claiming external platform behavior.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial remediation execution including fixture verification, docs, PR, merge, and closure.

preReviewWarnings: Keep local fixture results distinct from not_run provider and enterprise evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A single cross-stack command aggregates Python, Java, and TypeScript lifecycle phases and independent adopter Git evidence.
Install, Configure, Normal Work Item, Ambiguous Request, Critical Domain Change, Upgrade, Rollback, and Release Check are represented with pass/block semantics and resume conditions.
Provider, identity, enterprise assurance, performance, and multi-agent evidence remain explicitly not_run or not_claimed.
Tests verify the independent repository lifecycle and all available stack fixtures without inferring unavailable toolchains.
English and Japanese documentation describe the long-cycle command and evidence boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Long-cycle validation is split across fixture harnesses and adopter Git checks, so reviewers lack one repeatable cross-stack evidence bundle and a clear distinction between local execution and external not_run evidence.
constraints: Use isolated temporary repositories and bounded fixtures.
Do not require cloud credentials or claim external provider execution.
Preserve blocked ambiguous and critical-domain phases with actionable resume conditions.
Use standard-library orchestration and keep existing fixture commands intact.
intent.rationale: A single evidence bundle makes cross-stack lifecycle coverage reviewable while preserving honest boundaries for unavailable tools and external systems.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Aggregate bounded cross-stack and independent adopter long-cycle evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Python, Java, and TypeScript lifecycle phases
independent adopter upgrade, rollback, and cleanup
external and unavailable evidence remains not_run/not_claimed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance files, tests, docs, PR, merge, and lifecycle closure.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
